name: Age
description: A person's age or age range. Protected under US ADEA (40+) for employment advertising, under FHA for housing (except in statutory senior-housing exemption), and under EU AVMSD for certain content-directed targeting. Not a GDPR Art 9 special category but treated as restricted for the regulated verticals.
regulatory_basis: US ADEA (29 U.S.C. § 621), US FHA (42 U.S.C. § 3604), UK Equality Act 2010
excludes: COPPA children-under-13 detection for compliance purposes — that's a regulatory carve-out, not prohibited targeting
guidance: Age targeting is heavily scrutinized in employment (ADEA covers workers 40+), housing (FHA prohibits excluding families with children; senior housing exemption under 42 U.S.C. 3607(b) requires documentation), and credit. Age targeting remains legal for age-gated verticals (alcohol, tobacco, gambling).
